option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.FlowPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.GaleriesController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="18.0" left="18.0" right="18.0" top="16.0" /> </padding> <children> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <VBox spacing="4.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Gestion des galeries" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle" text="Recherche, filtre et gestion complete des galeries" /> </VBox> <Button fx:id="addGalerieButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onAddGalerieClick" styleClass="primary-action-button" text="Ajouter galerie" /> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="list-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="14.0" left="14.0" right="14.0" top="14.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <TextField fx:id="rechercheField" promptText="Rechercher galerie (nom, adresse, localisation...)" styleClass="gallery-search-field" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Label text="Filtrer par" /> <ComboBox fx:id="filtreComboBox" prefWidth="190.0" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="emptyStateLabel" styleClass="section-subtitle" text="Aucune galerie trouvee." visible="false" managed="false" />
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="gallery-scroll" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <content> <FlowPane fx:id="galeriesFlowPane" hgap="12.0" vgap="12.0" styleClass="gallery-flow"> <padding> <Insets bottom="6.0" left="2.0" right="2.0" top="6.0" /> </padding> </FlowPane> </content> </ScrollPane> </VBox> </children> </VBox>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="UTF-8"?>
<?import javafx.geometry.Insets?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Button?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ComboBox?> <?import javafx.scene.control.Label?> <?import javafx.scene.control.ScrollPane?> <?import javafx.scene.control.TextField?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.GridPane?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.HBox?> <?import javafx.scene.layout.VBox?>
<VBox spacing="14.0" styleClass="page-root" xmlns="http://javafx.com/javafx/20.0.2" xmlns:fx="http://javafx.com/fxml/1" fx:controller="controllers.GaleriesController"> <padding> <Insets bottom="18.0" left="18.0" right="18.0" top="16.0" /> </padding> <HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT"> <VBox spacing="4.0" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS"> <Label styleClass="page-title" text="Gestion des galeries" /> <Label styleClass="page-subtitle" text="Recherche, filtre et gestion complete des galeries" /> </VBox> <Button fx:id="addGalerieButton" mnemonicParsing="false" onAction="#onAddGalerieClick" styleClass="primary-action-button" text="Ajouter galerie" /> </HBox>
<VBox spacing="12.0" styleClass="list-card"> <padding> <Insets bottom="14.0" left="14.0" right="14.0" top="14.0" /> </padding>
<HBox alignment="CENTER_LEFT" spacing="10.0"> <TextField fx:id="rechercheField" promptText="Rechercher galerie (nom, adresse, localisation...)" styleClass="gallery-search-field" HBox.hgrow="ALWAYS" /> <Label text="Filtrer par" /> <ComboBox fx:id="filtreComboBox" prefWidth="190.0" /> </HBox>
<Label fx:id="emptyStateLabel" styleClass="section-subtitle" text="Aucune galerie trouvee." visible="false" managed="false" />
<ScrollPane fitToWidth="true" hbarPolicy="NEVER" styleClass="gallery-scroll" VBox.vgrow="ALWAYS"> <GridPane fx:id="galeriesListContainer" hgap="12.0" vgap="12.0" styleClass="gallery-flow"> <padding> <Insets bottom="6.0" left="2.0" right="2.0" top="6.0" /> </padding> </GridPane> </ScrollPane> </VBox> </VBox>
